text: My package arrived in two separate shipments, and one box was completely crushed. The product inside was damaged beyond use. Very disappointed with the quality of packaging.
I ordered a single item but received it in two shipments, 5 days apart. The second package never arrived. I need a refund or I'm filing a chargeback with my bank.
Worst delivery experience ever. Package was left in the rain, box was soaked through, and the electronics inside were water damaged. Customer service was unhelpful. Will never order again.
Product quality is good but the shipping takes too long compared to competitors. I waited 14 days for a '2-day shipping' order. Please improve your logistics.

I received a completely different product than what I ordered. The SKU on the packing slip matches my order but the item inside is wrong. This is the second time this has happened with split shipments.
Great product and fast delivery! Everything arrived in perfect condition. The packaging was secure and well-protected. Will definitely order again.
Split shipment caused confusion — I thought part of my order was missing. The tracking information was also inaccurate, showing delivered when it wasn't. Frustrating experience overall.

I'm writing to complain about the excessive packaging waste. My small item came in an enormous box filled with plastic. Also, why was it shipped from a warehouse 2000 miles away when your website says you have local fulfilment?
Product is exactly as described. Shipping was reasonable. Only complaint is the generic packaging — would be nice for a premium product to have premium presentation.
@BrandName your shipping is a JOKE. Ordered express, got it in 12 days. Meanwhile I can get same-day from your competitor. Fix your supply chain or lose customers. #BadService #NeverAgain
